name: vision-extract
description: Full text extraction from document images. Tests OCR quality on German documents: invoices, receipts, recipes, and technical documents. The model should produce clean, structured markdown.
system_prompt: Extract all visible text from this document image. Return it as clean, well-structured markdown. Preserve the document structure: use headings, tables, and lists where appropriate. Keep numbers, dates, and amounts exactly as they appear. Do not add commentary or interpretation.

turns.user: Extract all text from this document.
